overall.description: A first-person driving simulation from inside an Audi on a multi-lane highway at night during heavy rain. The windshield wipers are active throughout as the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic, overtaking trucks and cars while street lights illuminate the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway at night in heavy rain

agents.ego_description: driving steadily in the left lane of a rain-slicked highway at night with windshield wipers active

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: metal guardrail running parallel to the left side of the highway
metal guardrail running parallel to the right side of the highway
tall dual-lamp street light pole illuminating the highway
faint building lights visible on the horizon to the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside an Audi driving on a multi-lane highway at night during heavy rain. Windshield wipers sweep across the glass as the vehicle moves past metal guardrails on both sides, illuminated by periodic overhead street lights. A white sedan is visible ahead in the distance, and faint city lights glow on the left horizon.

events.description: large white truck appears in the right lane, moving slower than ego vehicle
ego vehicle overtakes the large truck on the left, moving past its trailer

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while overtaking a large truck in the right lane

notable_agents.action: large white semi-truck being overtaken in the right lane

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving through the rain-slicked highway, approaching and overtaking a large white semi-truck in the right lane. The windshield wipers maintain a steady rhythm as the car passes the truck's trailer. Street lights continue to illuminate the road at regular intervals, and the distant city lights fade from view.

events.description: yellow sedan appears in the right lane, traveling at similar speed
ego vehicle accelerates and overtakes the yellow sedan on the left

agents.ego_description: accelerating to overtake a yellow sedan while maintaining lane position in heavy rain

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan being overtaken in the right lane

segments.scene_description: Driving continues through the rainy night as the vehicle approaches and overtakes a yellow sedan in the right lane. The highway stretches ahead with wet asphalt reflecting the street lights. Other vehicles are visible in the distance, and the guardrails continue along both sides of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching toll gantry or overhead sign structure

events.description: approaching large overhead toll gantry structure spanning the highway
driving directly underneath the overhead toll gantry structure

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed while approaching and passing under the overhead highway structure

entered.detail: large overhead metal structure spanning the highway with lights and sensors

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle approaching a large overhead toll gantry or sign structure spanning the highway. The car drives underneath the metal framework, briefly sheltered from the rain, before emerging on the other side. Street lights continue along the road ahead, and the highway stretches into the dark, rainy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside an Audi navigating a rain-slicked highway at night, moving from an open stretch of road toward a large overhead structure. It begins with the windshield wipers sweeping across the glass as the vehicle passes metal guardrails under the glow of periodic street lights, with faint city lights shimmering on the distant horizon. As the car maintains its speed, the view shifts to overtake a large white semi-truck in the right lane, causing the distant city glow to fade from view. The camera then continues forward, passing a yellow sedan while the wet asphalt reflects the overhead lighting, before turning toward a massive metal toll gantry spanning the highway. The vehicle finally drives underneath the framework, briefly sheltered from the heavy rain, before emerging back into the dark, rainy distance.
